mechanics.excerpt: Finally: any Knockout Checks are made with Modifier to the TN, So long as the doses have not all been used UP, BASIC EQUIPMENT The most basic of medical equipment enough treat common injuries the case of serious and life-threatening injuries; at best these kits can be stopgap measure that can Keep person alive Iong enough for someone with advanced medical training and equipment take Over_ Medlcal Kit The personal medical kit contains enough bandages and other supplies t0 tend all minor wounds, can also be used to Keep critically wounded character alive long enough tor medic or doctor t0 tend to the wounds: character performing First Aid needs such kit to avoid Lack of Proper Equipment Modifier Clan LSSU The Clans developed more sophisticated version Of the medipack, designated the Life Support Sustaining Unit (LSSU): Initially the L SSUs were only available t0 elementals; but Clan MechWarriors and pilots are now using this device.
